subcodes.first_line: O servant at the Threshold of Divine Unity! The Supreme Deputy is the keeper of the Most Great Threshold—that is to say, the guardian of His court. How excellent indeed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه احدیت نواب اعلی بواب عتبه کبریاست یعنی پاسبان آستانست فنعم ما
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
